description_long: This hammer features a robust, metallic head with a broad, slightly curved striking surface and a matching metallic base. The handle is straight and wrapped in a reddish-brown material, possibly leather or a synthetic grip, with three lighter horizontal bands near the top for added grip or decoration. The head and base have a shiny, reflective gold or brass-like finish, giving the tool a premium appearance. The handle appears to be ergonomically designed for a comfortable grip, and the overall proportions suggest it is a compact, hand-held tool suitable for urban maintenance or construction tasks. No visible branding or markings are present on the hammer. The object appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A compact hammer with a shiny metallic head and base, and a straight, reddish-brown handle featuring decorative grip bands. The tool has a premium, well-maintained appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, curved metallic head, straight handle with three grip bands, and matching metallic base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the head and handle, with the metallic surfaces reflecting light.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same head, handle, and base features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the slim profile and reflective metallic surfaces.
attribute_handle_type: Straight handle wrapped in reddish-brown leather or synthetic grip with three lighter horizontal bands for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Broad, slightly curved metallic head with a flat striking face, resembling a sledge or mallet type without claws.
